old_value: {"id":"kanteto-14p.1","title":"Initialize Go module and project structure","description":"Run go mod init, create directory skeleton (cmd/, internal/task/, internal/store/, internal/tui/, internal/daemon/, internal/nlp/, internal/config/), add main.go entry point","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"36678465+jwp23@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:10Z","created_by":"Joseph Presley","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:10Z"}

{"id":"kanteto-14p.2","title":"Implement task domain model with ULID","description":"Create internal/task/model.go with Task struct (ID, Title, DueAt, Completed, CompletedAt, CreatedAt, RemindAt, Reminded, RecurrencePattern, RecurrenceTime, RecurrenceNextDue) and internal/task/id.go with ULID generation","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"36678465+jwp23@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:13Z","created_by":"Joseph Presley","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:13Z"}

{"id":"kanteto-14p.3","title":"Implement XDG config package","description":"Create internal/config/ package with XDG-compliant config loading from ~/.config/kanteto/config.toml. Support lead_time for reminders and sound file path","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"36678465+jwp23@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:14Z","created_by":"Joseph Presley","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:14Z"}

{"id":"kanteto-9xs","title":"Implement NLP date parsing","description":"Create internal/nlp/ package that parses natural language dates: 'march 11', 'tomorrow', 'next friday', 'weekdays at 4pm', etc. Used by kt add --by and --every flags","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"36678465+jwp23@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:16Z","created_by":"Joseph Presley","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:16Z"}

{"id":"kanteto-nl4","title":"Implement SQLite store with migrations","description":"Create internal/store/ package with SQLite repository using modernc.org/sqlite. Schema: tasks table, schema_version table, WAL mode, indexes on due_at/remind_at/completed. Auto-create DB at XDG_DATA_HOME/kanteto/kanteto.db","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"36678465+jwp23@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:18Z","created_by":"Joseph Presley","updated_at":"2026-03-04T01:42:18Z"}

{"id":"kanteto-90e","title":"Implement task service layer","description":"Create internal/task/service.go that provides business logic: Add, Complete, Delete, Snooze, List (by date range), GetDueReminders.
